SEARCH
Package persistence

Class AppointmentDAO

java.lang.Object
persistence.AppointmentDAO
public class AppointmentDAO extends Object
Data Access Object for Appointment entities.

Handles all database operations for the appointments table, including insert, query, status updates, participant updates, type updates, slot rescheduling, admin-note writes, and automatic marking of past appointments as DONE.

All appointment-type and status strings are normalized through private helper methods before being sent to the database, so callers can safely pass the constants defined in Appointment.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Student

  • Constructor Details

    • AppointmentDAO

      public AppointmentDAO(Connection connection)
      Constructs an AppointmentDAO backed by the given JDBC connection.
      Parameters:
      connection - active connection to the PostgreSQL database

  • Method Details

    • markPastAppointmentsDone

      public void markPastAppointmentsDone() throws SQLException
      Marks every CONFIRMED or PENDING appointment whose end_time is in the past as DONE. Call once at application startup.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • addAppointment

      public void addAppointment(Appointment appointment) throws SQLException
      Inserts a new appointment. created_at and updated_at are set automatically.
      Parameters:
      appointment - appointment to persist (id field is ignored)
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • getAppointmentById

      public Appointment getAppointmentById(long id) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a single appointment by primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      Returns:
      the matching Appointment, or null if not found
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • getAllAppointments

      public List<Appointment> getAllAppointments() throws SQLException
      Returns all appointments ordered by start_time ascending.
      Returns:
      list of all appointments
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • getActiveAppointmentsByDate

      public List<Appointment> getActiveAppointmentsByDate(LocalDate date) throws SQLException
      Returns active (CONFIRMED/PENDING) appointments for a specific work day. Excludes DONE and CANCELED appointments.
      Parameters:
      date - the work day date
      Returns:
      list of active appointments on that day
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • getFutureAppointmentsByDate

      public List<Appointment> getFutureAppointmentsByDate(LocalDate date) throws SQLException
      Returns future active appointments for a specific work day.
      Parameters:
      date - the work day date
      Returns:
      list of future CONFIRMED appointments on that day
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • getAppointmentsByUser

      public List<Appointment> getAppointmentsByUser(long userId) throws SQLException
      Returns all appointments for a specific user, ordered by start_time.
      Parameters:
      userId - numeric user ID
      Returns:
      list of appointments for that user
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • updateStatus

      public int updateStatus(long id, String newStatus) throws SQLException
      Updates only the status of an appointment.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      newStatus - STATUS_* constant
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • cancelByAdmin

      public int cancelByAdmin(long id, String note) throws SQLException
      Cancels an appointment by admin: sets status=CANCELED, stores note, sets canceled_by_admin=TRUE.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      note - admin reason (may be null)
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • updateStatusAndNote

      public int updateStatusAndNote(long id, String newStatus, String note) throws SQLException
      Updates status and sets an admin note.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      newStatus - STATUS_* constant
      note - admin note
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • updateParticipants

      public int updateParticipants(long id, int newCount) throws SQLException
      Updates participant count only (for visitor edits on Group appointments). FIX: also updates max_participants so the DB chk_cap constraint is not violated when participants_count exceeds the old max_participants value.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      newCount - new participant count (1-5)
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • updateParticipantsAndNote

      public int updateParticipantsAndNote(long id, int newCount, String note) throws SQLException
      Updates participant count and sets an admin note. Also fixes max_participants to avoid chk_cap violation.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      newCount - new participant count
      note - admin note
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • updateTypeAndNote

      public int updateTypeAndNote(long id, String newType, String note) throws SQLException
      Updates appointment type and optionally sets an admin note. When switching from Individual to Group, also sets max_participants=5.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      newType - TYPE_* constant
      note - admin note (may be null)
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • updateType

      public int updateType(long id, String newType) throws SQLException
      Updates appointment type only (for visitor edits). When switching from Individual to Group, also sets max_participants=5. When switching from Group to Individual, resets participants_count=1, max_participants=1.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      newType - TYPE_* constant
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • updateSlotAndTime

      public int updateSlotAndTime(long id, long newSlotId, OffsetDateTime newStart, OffsetDateTime newEnd) throws SQLException
      Reschedules to a different slot.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      newSlotId - new time slot ID
      newStart - new start time
      newEnd - new end time
      Returns:
      rows affected
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • deleteAppointment

      public void deleteAppointment(long id) throws SQLException
      Permanently deletes an appointment record.
      Parameters:
      id - appointment ID
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs
